chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1269 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA-2727/2017 3. For katcha peshi. 09.10.2017 Mr. Ayatullah Khawaja, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel a/w Inspector Manzoor Ali o/b of DIGP Hyderabad, Inspector Yousuf Tagar I/C CIA Tando Allahyar, SIP Riaz Soomro SHO P.S B-Section Tando Allahyar and SIP Mazhar Pitafi, Addl.SHO of P.S A- Section Tando Allahyar. = With reference to the notice of this case, learned A.A.G files parawise comments/statements on behalf of respondents No., 2, 3, 4 and 5, which are taken on record and copies whereof supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. It is stated in the statements/comments that the allegations made in the petition against the official respondents are false. It is further stated in the comments that neither the petitioner was caused any harassment nor any threat has been given or will be given to him, however, the official respondents have undertaken that the petitioner will be provided protection in the event he approaches them with such a request. Be that as it may, this petition is being disposed of with direction to the official respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioner and that they will provide protection to the petitioner in the event the petitioner approaches them with such a request. The official respondents are further directed to discharge their functions and duties strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
